errors.unauthorized: Authentication is required to access this resource
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action
errors.token_expired: Token expired. Please refresh your authentication token.
errors.invalid_token: Invalid token. Please provide a valid authentication token.
errors.user_not_found: Requested user with ID {user_id} not found
errors.method_not_allowed: Method {method} is not allowed for this path: {path}. Please use the correct HTTP method according to the API documentation.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again after some time.
errors.invalid_pagination_page: Page must be a positive integer: {page}
errors.invalid_pagination_page_size: Page size must be between 1 and {max_page_size}: {page_size}
errors.password_strength: Password must be at least 6 characters long and contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character
errors.external_service_unavailable: The external service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.external_api_bad_request: The external API returned a bad request. Please try again later.
errors.external_api_rate_limited: The external API returned a rate limit error. Please try again later.
errors.insufficient_permissions: You do not have sufficient permissions to perform this action.
errors.missing_configuration: Missing configuration. Ensure SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are set.
errors.invalid_access_token_or_user_not_found: Invalid access token or user not found.
errors.access_token_expired: Access token has expired. Please refresh your token.
errors.failed_to_create_isometrik_user: Failed to create Isometrik user. Please try again later.
